name: Kaimana Shave Ice
tagline: Artisan syrups from scratch — the most refined shave ice on the North Shore by a wide margin.
mustOrder: seasonal specials (they rotate based on what fruit is available)
parking: Limited street parking — the Haleiwa lot near the harbor works
talkStory: The owners are food artisans who treat shave ice like craft cocktails — every detail is intentional, from ice texture to syrup viscosity. This is the connoisseur's pick. They do small batches so flavors sell out — go early in their window. Pair with a Haleiwa town stroll — hit the art galleries and surf shops while you're at it.
